Verb forms are consistent across subjects (e.g., pregarna for hugged in c/j), indicating analytic structure with synthetic elements. For N2/N3 translations, words and patterns from N1 were applied directly; clitics before verbs, indefinites with edin/edno. Verb conjugation varies slightly by person (e.g., scratched as odrasna 3sg in g, vărvi 2sg in N2 e), reflecting synthetic nature. No external knowledge used; all deduced from given data patterns.
